# CopilotRevive Skills Index

These skills were extracted from the reusable migration cookbooks in `CopilotRevive/cookbooks`.

## Hello World ŌĆö Java Update (mapped from `cookbooks/`)

> Skills below were generated by the `transformation.cookbooks.mapper` agent for the
> issue **"Hello Worldd - cookbooks processing - Java Update to current version"**.
> Each skill directory must contain a `SKILL.md` file following the structure
> `skills/<skill_name>/SKILL.md`.

- `obligatory_ai_generated_comment` ŌĆö Every new file and new class must carry `// generated by AI in Github cloud`.
- `obligatory_java_to_python_migration` ŌĆö Good-code-practices checklist for JavaŌåÆPython migration.
- `obligatory_mermaid_architecture_documentation` ŌĆö Architecture docs must include Mermaid diagrams.
